examples: Never let it be said that there is anyone more dismissive of naturopathy.
He is a practicing Doctor of Naturopathy specialized in Wheatgrass Therapy.
A complete Handbook of Nature Cure (265 pages) a complete guide to naturopathy.
Believers in acupuncture, naturopathy, Reiki, and homeopathy will argue that they are not unethical, because the treatments work.
